summary: Major backend refactoring regression test completed successfully. The 3900-line server.py monolith was split into 10 modular route files. All 37 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified dashboard loads, tab navigation works, and state is preserved across navigation.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/cv/latest-analysis returns has_analysis:false for new user
GET /api/referentiel/explorer/stats returns statistics (20 filieres, 85 secteurs, 45 metiers)
GET /api/evolution-index/jobs returns jobs with evolution indices
GET /api/evolution-index/sectors returns sectors with evolution indices
frontend_ui_tests: Homepage loads with Re'Actif Pro title
Accéder à mon espace button navigates to dashboard
CV section displays 4 model cards (Classique, Compétences, Fonctionnel, Mixte)
Explorateur shows stats: 20 Filières, 85 Secteurs, 45 Métiers
Navigation back to Tableau de bord preserves state
Observatoire shows emerging skills and sector transformation indices

modular_refactoring.description: server.py split into 10 route modules under /app/backend/routes/
modules_tested: routes/cv.py - CV analysis with latest-analysis endpoint
routes/seed.py - Seed data and root route

cv_persistence_fix.description: CV analysis results persist across tab navigation

seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed creates 5 jobs, 5 modules, 5 emerging_skills, 3 sector_trends, 6 job_indices, 4 sector_indices, 5 ubuntoo_exchanges, 4 ubuntoo_signals, 3 ubuntoo_insights
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major backend refactoring regression test completed. The monolithic server.py (3900+ lines) was successfully split into 10 modular route files. All 37 API endpoints tested work correctly. Frontend dashboard loads, all tabs navigate properly, CV section persists state. Explorer shows correct stats (20 filieres, 85 secteurs, 45 metiers). Observatoire displays emerging skills with transformation indices. No issues found after refactoring.
